query:
SELECT 
  d.id,
  d.client_id,
  c.name AS clientName,
  d.date,
  d.start_time,
  d.end_time,
  d.status,
  d.break_hours
FROM demands d
LEFT JOIN clients c ON d.client_id = c.id
WHERE d.id = 390142;
